title: 10 years of AlphaGo: The turning point for AI | Thore Graepel & Pushmeet Kohli
summary: Google DeepMind releases a retrospective on the 10th anniversary of AlphaGo's victory over Lee Sedol in March 2016. The video frames this match as the turning point that sparked the modern AI revolution, with foundations for subsequent breakthroughs in algorithmic discovery and scientific challenges like protein folding.
